message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

interface Observer {
    + notify(event: ManagerEvent)
}

class System {
    - managedTypes: List<ComponentType>
    - filteredEntities: List<Entity>
    + addEntityRef(): Unit
    + removeEntityRef(): Unit
    + update(): Unit
    # checkEntityISCompatible(): Unit
}

class EntityManager {
    - entities: List<Entity>
    - systems: Set<Observer>
    + subscribe(system: Observer)
    + addEntity(entity: Entity)
    + removeEntity(id: Int)
    # notifySystems(event: ManagerEvent)
}

class ComponentType {
    DIRECTION, POSITION, SPEED, SPAWN, ...
}

class Entity {
    <<Product Type>>
    - ID: Int
    - components: Map<ComponentType, Component>
}

class Component {
    <<Product Type>>
    - type: ComponentType
}

' Relationships
System --|> Observer : implements
EntityManager o-- "0..*" Observer : observes
EntityManager *-- "0..*" Entity : manages
Entity *-- "0..*" Component : contains
ComponentType *-- "1" Component : defines
System o-- "0..*" Entity : filters
System *-- "1..*" ComponentType : uses

' Notes
note right of Entity
    Module + Case Class
end note

@enduml
```
